'''wohamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euchological|euchological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euchological|euchological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wohamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohamithi|wohamithi]] || [[word:wohamiji|wohamiji]] || [[word:wohamishi|wohamishi]] || [[word:wohamiki|wohamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohamuthuthu|wohamuthuthu]] || [[word:wohamujuju|wohamujuju]] || [[word:wohamushushu|wohamushushu]] || [[word:wohamukuku|wohamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohamuthu|wohamuthu]] || [[word:wohamuju|wohamuju]] || [[word:wohamushu|wohamushu]] || [[word:wohamuku|wohamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohamufthuf|wohamufthuf]] || [[word:wohamufjuf|wohamufjuf]] || [[word:wohamufshuf|wohamufshuf]] || [[word:wohamufkuf|wohamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohamethe|wohamethe]] || [[word:wohameje|wohameje]] || [[word:wohameshe|wohameshe]] || [[word:wohameke|wohameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohamothotho|wohamothotho]] || [[word:wohamojojo|wohamojojo]] || [[word:wohamoshosho|wohamoshosho]] || [[word:wohamokoko|wohamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohamotho|wohamotho]] || [[word:wohamojo|wohamojo]] || [[word:wohamosho|wohamosho]] || [[word:wohamoko|wohamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohamofthof|wohamofthof]] || [[word:wohamofjof|wohamofjof]] || [[word:wohamofshof|wohamofshof]] || [[word:wohamofkof|wohamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfthÃŸf|wohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfjÃŸf|wohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfshÃŸf|wohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfkÃŸf|wohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wohamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wohamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wohamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wohamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfthÃŸf|wohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfjÃŸf|wohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfshÃŸf|wohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfkÃŸf|wohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfthÃŸf|wohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfjÃŸf|wohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfshÃŸf|wohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohamÃŸfkÃŸf|wohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohamÃḊthÃḊ|wohamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wohamÃḊjÃḊ|wohamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wohamÃḊshÃḊ|wohamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wohamÃḊkÃḊ|wohamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohamathatha|wohamathatha]] || [[word:wohamajaja|wohamajaja]] || [[word:wohamashasha|wohamashasha]] || [[word:wohamakaka|wohamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohamatha|wohamatha]] || [[word:wohamaja|wohamaja]] || [[word:wohamasha|wohamasha]] || [[word:wohamaka|wohamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohamafthaf|wohamafthaf]] || [[word:wohamafjaf|wohamafjaf]] || [[word:wohamafshaf|wohamafshaf]] || [[word:wohamafkaf|wohamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wohamasha|wohamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wohamshÃḋsha|wohamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wohamrosha|wohamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wohamusha|wohamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wohamyasha|wohamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowohamnkshÃḋsha|gowohamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowohamnkrosha|gowohamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowohamnkmusha|gowohamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowohamnkyasha|gowohamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wohahamasha|wohahamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wohahamshÃḋsha|wohahamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wohahamrosha|wohahamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wohahamusha|wohahamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wohahamyasha|wohahamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowohahamnkshÃḋsha|gowohahamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowohahamnkrosha|gowohahamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowohahamnkmusha|gowohahamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowohahamnkyasha|gowohahamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wehÃḊmasha|wehÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wehÃḊmshÃḋsha|wehÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wehÃḊmrosha|wehÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wehÃḊmusha|wehÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wehÃḊmyasha|wehÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowehÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gowehÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowehÃḊmnkrosha|gowehÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowehÃḊmnkmusha|gowehÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowehÃḊmnkyasha|gowehÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wohfamasha|wohfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wohfamshÃḋsha|wohfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wohfamrosha|wohfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wohfamusha|wohfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wohfamyasha|wohfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowohfamnkshÃḋsha|gowohfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowohfamnkrosha|gowohfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowohfamnkmusha|gowohfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowohfamnkyasha|gowohfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
